hooks.command: echo 'ENFORCE CLAUDE.md SKILL RULES THIS TURN: 1) find files/components with the graphify skill, not Glob/Grep/find; 2) reply to the user in caveman-compress style; 3) use firecrawl ONLY when content is missing from the UPDATE/ folder; 4) never invent content shown on the site; 5) check UPDATE/README.txt before decisions. END your reply with one line reporting which skills you used and why for any you skipped.'
